name: @ambulant/clinical-codes
description: Shared clinical code search (ICD-10, RxNorm) for all apps

scripts.// how to use: Run *seed* now. Later, replace with real sources.
scripts.codes:ensure: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const need=(f)=>!fs.existsSync(p.resolve(__dirname,'data',f));const s=[];if(need('icd10.min.json.gz'))s.push('npm run codes:icd10:seed');if(need('rxnorm.min.json.gz'))s.push('npm run codes:rxnorm:seed');if(s.length){console.log('building seed datasets...');require('child_process').execSync(s.join(' && '),{stdio:'inherit'});}else{console.log('codes ok');}"
scripts.codes:rxnav:refresh: npm run codes:rxnav:fetch && npm run codes:rxnav:build
scripts.codes:all:refresh: npm run codes:icd10:fetch && npm run codes:icd10:build && npm run codes:rxnav:refresh
